text: I had MOT today after recently moving to the area I’m glad I chose auto safety center. They were polite, professional, and friendly.
Really polite & helpful, I was able to call up and they asked me to come down the same day. They were genuine and sorted my problem. Would definitely recommend

Very good garage! Always seem honest and never charge an arm and a leg, which is a worry for many people when they don’t know much about cars. We recently tried the Widnes branch which was also great! Thanks. We have had our mot’s amongst other jobs done at this garage.
Excellent service - arrived with no appointment and two punctures fixed within 15 minutes. Good price too! Will now be my go to for any tyre issues

Great customer service. Called up for a quote for Aircon re gas and was happy with the quote also they could fit me in right away. The car is like a freezer now. Very happy, I Would recommend and will use again. Thanks Auto Safety Prescot!
